caption: A screen capture displays a webpage for a "List Randomizer" from RANDOM.ORG. The page lists numbers 1.5 through 10.2 in random order and includes a warning stating, "Advisory: We only operate services from the RANDOM.ORG domain. Other sites that claim to be operated by us are imposters." To the right, a chat window features messages from users "angelist" and "Nightbot." "angelist" says, "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can," while "Nightbot" provides a link for "the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE." At the bottom of the screen, a promotional banner for "JAY S CASEBREAKS.COM" features an image of a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap. Across all four frames, the visual content remains static, with no changes in text, images, or layout.
